# iproute_xfrm_state (Resource)

Manages an XFRM/IPsec security association state (ip xfrm state).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# ESP state with AEAD (tunnel mode)
resource "iproute_xfrm_state" "esp_aead" {
  src   = "10.0.0.1"
  dst   = "10.0.0.2"
  proto = "esp"
  spi   = 5000
  mode  = "tunnel"

  aead {
    name    = "rfc4106(gcm(aes))"
    key     = "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567"
    icv_len = 128
  }
}

# ESP state with separate encryption
resource "iproute_xfrm_state" "esp_crypt" {
  src   = "10.0.0.1"
  dst   = "10.0.0.2"
  proto = "esp"
  spi   = 5001
  mode  = "transport"

  crypt {
    name = "cbc(aes)"
    key  = "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef"
  }

  auth {
    name = "hmac(sha256)"
    key  = "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef"
  }
}

# AH state
resource "iproute_xfrm_state" "ah" {
  src   = "10.0.0.1"
  dst   = "10.0.0.2"
  proto = "ah"
  spi   = 6000

  auth {
    name = "hmac(sha256)"
    key  = "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef"
  }
}

# IPv6 XFRM state
resource "iproute_xfrm_state" "ipv6" {
  src   = "fd00::1"
  dst   = "fd00::2"
  proto = "esp"
  spi   = 7000
  mode  = "tunnel"

  aead {
    name    = "rfc4106(gcm(aes))"
    key     = "0x0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567"
    icv_len = 128
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dst` (String) Destination IP.
- `proto` (String) Protocol (esp, ah, comp).
- `spi` (Number) Security Parameter Index.
- `src` (String) Source IP.

### Optional

- `aead` (Block, Optional) AEAD algorithm. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--aead))
- `auth` (Block, Optional) Authentication algorithm. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--auth))
- `crypt` (Block, Optional) Encryption algorithm. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--crypt))
- `if_id` (Number) Interface ID.
- `mark` (Number) Mark value.
- `mark_mask` (Number) Mark mask.
- `mode` (String) Mode (transport, tunnel).
- `replay_window` (Number) Replay window size.
- `reqid` (Number) Request ID.

### Read-Only

- `family` (String) Address family.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

Optional:

- `icv_len` (Number)
- `key` (String, Sensitive)
- `name` (String)
